summary: The video shows a rainy day with wet roads, viewed from inside a vehicle. Raindrops obscure the windshield, limiting visibility. Multiple cars are present on the road, including a white SUV ahead whose brake lights illuminate intermittently.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles are visible on the road, including a white SUV ahead whose brake lights illuminate intermittently.

uncertainties: Visibility limitations due to raindrops obscure the windshield.

risk_assessment.why: Limited visibility caused by raindrops may impair driver reaction times, but there is no direct collision or hazardous maneuver observed.
